title: Craftable Name Tag [FORGE, NEOFORGE]
description: With this mod you can craft name tags with a string and paper
body:
# Crafting:
The crafting is very simple; you just need a string, a paper sheet and you can craft the name tag. The crafting is shapeless. Avaible for datapack [here](https://modrinth.com/datapack/craftable-name-tag-datapack)
# See also:
Lively by Alexio [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lively-by-alexio)
Fast Sand Smelting [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-asnd-smelting)
